capability: RoPE scaling/extension — REQUIRES a rope scaling type/factor declared in metadata

harness.working_tree: WIN2METAL Phase 2 (Bucket A) validation on Apple M4 16GB. Binary is the FROZEN base build /Volumes/Untitled/camelid-base-28f224b (camelid v0.1.7-92-g28f224b, commit 28f224b); no src changes in this branch. Outputs salvaged under qa/capability/mac_*_out/<row>/.
harness.e2e_harness: qa/capability/* Metal harness; outputs under qa/capability/mac_*_out/llama-3.2-1b

evidence.summary: e2e on Metal (qa/capability/context_parity.mjs, Apple M4, --verify-mode reference-only): a 5813-token prompt is decoded greedily (temperature=0). Camelid emits a server-sealed camelid.parity-receipt/v1; `camelid verify-receipt --reference-only` feeds the exact 5813 prompt token ids to llama.cpp 9632 (acd79d603, Metal) /completion — the continuation matches BIT-EXACT (generated tokens (8), first_divergent_token_index=-1; self-digest + lane-identity + reference-rerun PASS). Here the 5813-token prompt sits WITHIN the original 8192 window (this run did not reach the >8192 extension regime — that remains as-validated on the Windows row); the byte-exact match still confirms Camelid applies the GGUF's baked rope_freqs.weight (llama3 NTK-by-parts) scaling identically to llama.cpp across all 5813 positions, and KV-cache correctness across the whole context, on Metal. MECHANISM: the GGUF declares no llama.rope.scaling.* metadata; the llama3 scaling is baked into a rope_freqs.weight tensor that both engines read identically. The Camelid self-replay was skipped (reference-only) to bound the cost of a long Metal prefill; Camelid greedy determinism is independently established on the companion full self+reference runs (system_multiturn). KV projection passed the harness predict-and-abort gate. Evidence: qa/capability/mac_ctx_out/llama-3.2-1b/summary.json, parity-receipt.json, verify.log.
